programme.title: Mummy Papa Ki Shart-Titoo
programme.desc: The society members complain to Titoo's parents about his antics.

programme.title: Baal Baal Bache-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's neighbours face eviction by a group of swindlers, prompting him to help them. S02 E09.

programme.title: The Show Must Go On-Titoo
programme.desc: During the school's annual play, Shera hatches a plan to sabotage Golu's performance. S02 E10.

programme.title: Double Trouble-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean is delighted to meet Mr Pod but gets annoyed when Irma likes Pod more than him. S01E46.

programme.title: Home Movie-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Looking at the popularity of a horror movie, Mr. Beans decides to make one himself. S02E01.

programme.title: Fish Sitting-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean is in charge of Mrs Wicket's goldfish while she goes away for two days. S02E02.

programme.title: The Cruise-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes on a cruise trip but gets stranded on an island after he falls off the ship. S02E03.

programme.title: Coconut Shy-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr Bean cannot afford to buy a tea cup for Teddy so he heads to a carnival to win some money. S02E04.

programme.title: Green Bean-Mr. Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket cuts off Mr. Bean's power after seeing the bill. So, he builds his own wind turbine. S02E05.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E104.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E105.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E106.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E107.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E108.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E109.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E110.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E111.

programme.title: Bandbudh Aur Budbak
programme.desc: Two best friends, Badrinath and Budhdeb, make mischief and get into trouble at school. S01E112.

programme.title: Happy Children's Day-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and Golu plan a pizza feast for their neighbourhood, but Shera plans to ruin it. S02E11.

programme.title: Haunted House-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera's jealousy leads to a spooky prank on Titoo in a haunted house. S02E12.

programme.title: Cheater Shopkeeper-Titoo
programme.desc: Chacha's mismanagement of Gupta Ji's shop causes chaos, but Titoo steps in to help. S02E13.

programme.title: Titoo Superstar-Titoo
programme.desc: After his father tasks him with cleaning duty, Titoo fabricates a clever plan to evade it. S02E14.

programme.title: Titoo Kabootar-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo rescues an injured pigeon, but his parents decline to keep it. S02E15.

programme.title: Titoo Ka Report Card-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo frets over his poor marks and hatches a scheme to hide it from his parents. S02E16.

programme.title: Bachchon Ka Comparison-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's antics derail his parents' misguided efforts to copy another family's routine. S02E17.

programme.title: Anokhi Game-Titoo
programme.desc: The children discover a mysterious game board among Pasha the magician’s things. S07E11.

programme.title: Society Mein Election-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera plots to become the children's representative after Titoo's father wins an election. S02E18.

programme.title: Golu Bhaag Gaya-Titoo
programme.desc: After Golu stages his own kidnapping, Titoo takes charge to find him. S02E19.

programme.title: School Mein Gunde-Titoo
programme.desc: Three former students with a grudge take the teachers captive and begin to punish them. S02E20.

programme.title: Hockey Championship-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's captaincy for the International Hockey Championship sparks Shera's jealousy. S02E21.

programme.title: Superhero Ki Cap-Titoo
programme.desc: Password bhai and his gang of con artists hatch a scheme to rob the town's bank. S02E22.

programme.title: Titoo Ke Dada Ji-Titoo
programme.desc: To evade trouble at school, Titoo hires an actor to impersonate his grandfather. S02E23.

programme.title: Papa Ki Health Report-Titoo
programme.desc: Concerned about his father's health, Titoo undertakes a mission to improve his lifestyle. S02E24.

programme.title: Titoo Ki Doorbeen-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's new binoculars lead him to uncover an astronaut's kidnapping. S02E25.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: According to Choocha's dream, he has to improve his Hindi language to pass his exams. S01 E53.

programme.title: Fukrey Boyzzz
programme.desc: Laali's leg gets stuck in a hole and the boys seek Panditji's assistance. S01 E54.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice. S01E79.
